closeConfirm.title: Discard changes?
closeConfirm.description: You have unsaved content. What would you like to do?

contentType.title: Content Type
contentType.description: Choose the type of content you want to publish

post.label: Post
post.description: Text with images for social networks

video.label: Video
video.description: Video upload with thumbnails and metadata

step1.title: Select Social Network
step1.description: Choose which social network to publish to
step1.youtubeDesc: Upload videos with full YouTube Studio metadata
step1.youtubeRecommended: We recommend starting with YouTube as it's the only fully functional platform at the moment.

step2.title: Select YouTube Channels
step2.description: Choose which channel(s) to upload the video to
step2.channelWarning: Warning: Uploading the same video to multiple channels is not recommended. YouTube may limit the reach of identical videos without notice, potentially harming all channels involved.

step3.title: Storage Mode
step3.description: Choose how the video will be stored during processing
step3.localDescription: The video will be processed directly from your computer. No storage fees and the file stays on your device until upload.
step3.localRecommended: Recommended — only available option at this time
step3.cloudDescription: The video would be uploaded to our servers before publishing. This option will be available soon.
step3.cloudUnavailable: Unavailable — cloud storage requires infrastructure upgrade

step4.title: Video Details
step4.description: Configure all your video information just like YouTube Studio
step4.dropzone: Drag & drop video file here, or click to select
step4.fileRequired: Select a video file to continue
step4.fileTooLargeForPlatforms: File exceeds the {limit} limit compatible with selected platforms
step4.textVideoPlaceholder: Enter your video description (shared across platforms)
step4.textRequired: Add text or images to continue
step4.thumbnailUploaded: The thumbnail selected above will be used. You can customize after publishing in YouTube Studio.
step4.title: Title
step4.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your video (URLs, links, important information)
step4.thumbnailHint: Thumbnail is auto-generated. You can customize it later in YouTube Studio.
step4.tagsHint: Add tags to help viewers discover your video
step4.noCompatibleFields: No fields are compatible with the selected platforms
step4.madeForKids: Is this video made for children?
step4.madeForKidsNo: No, it's not made for kids
step4.madeForKidsHint: This setting affects available features and COPPA compliance
step4.aiGenerated: Does this video contain AI-generated or AI-modified content?
step4.aiGeneratedHint: You must disclose if content was created or altered by generative AI
step4.paidPromotion: Does this video contain paid promotion?
step4.paidPromotionHint: Inform if you received compensation for promoting a product or service
step4.monetizationTitle: Is this video eligible for monetization?
step4.monetizationHint: YouTube will verify if the video meets monetization guidelines
step4.adSuitabilityQuestion: Does your video's content, title, description, or keywords contain any of the following?
step4.adSuitabilityWhy: Rate your video accurately to ensure proper monetization.
step4.adSuitabilityNone: None of the Above — my video does not fall under any of the categories above
step4.adCat_inappropriateLanguage_l0_desc: No profanity in the title, thumbnail, or video content
step4.adCat_inappropriateLanguage_l1_desc: Abbreviated or obscured profanity, or words like 'hell' or 'damn' in the title, thumbnail, or content. Moderate profanity like 'bitch', 'douchebag', 'asshole', and 'shit' used frequently in the video. Most profanity used within music or stand up comedy.
step4.adCat_inappropriateLanguage_l2_desc: Strong profanity (like 'f*ck') used in thumbnails or titles. Use of extreme profanity, which includes hateful language or slurs in the video, thumbnail, or title.
step4.adCat_adultContent_l0_desc: No sexual content in the title, thumbnail, or video
step4.adCat_adultContent_l1_desc: Romance or kissing; discussions of romantic relationships without reference to intercourse; fully obscured nudity; dancing involving rhythmic body movements of commonly sexualized body parts without intent to arouse.
step4.adCat_adultContent_l2_desc: Exposed, minimally covered sexual body parts or full nudity; sexual acts (even if blurred or implied); discussion of sexual topics such as fetishes; thumbnail with sexual content; appearance of sex toys; erotic dances explicitly intended to arouse an audience.
step4.adCat_violence_l0_desc: No violence in the title, thumbnail, or video content
step4.adCat_violence_l1_desc: Law enforcement including regular duty in action (forcible arrest, crowd control); unedited gameplay violence after first 15 seconds; mild violence with minimal blood; dead bodies fully obscured or in educational context.
step4.adCat_violence_l2_desc: Dead bodies with obvious injury in educational/documentary settings; graphic game violence in thumbnail or early on; raw footage of armed conflict without injuries; description of graphic details of tragedies; dramatized content displaying severe and shocking injuries.
step4.adCat_shockingContent_l0_desc: No shocking content in the title, thumbnail, or video
step4.adCat_shockingContent_l1_desc: Light or moderately shocking content which is obscured or shown in context for educational, documentary, or other purposes.
step4.adCat_shockingContent_l2_desc: Shocking content like graphic images of human or animal body parts that is unobscured or intended to shock yet still provides general context.
step4.adCat_harmfulActs_l0_desc: No harmful acts in the title, thumbnail, or video content
step4.adCat_harmfulActs_l1_desc: Stunts or acts that are slightly dangerous, but performed in a professional and controlled environment where no one is seriously injured.
step4.adCat_harmfulActs_l2_desc: Content mainly showing accidents, vigilantism, pranks, or dangerous acts, such as experiments or stunts that have health risks, like drinking or eating non-edibles.
step4.adCat_recreationalDrugs_l0_desc: No reference to recreational drugs in title, thumbnail, or content
step4.adCat_recreationalDrugs_l1_desc: Educational, humorous, or music-related references about recreational drugs or paraphernalia, without intent to promote illegal drug usage. Documentary or journalistic content portraying drug usage.
step4.adCat_recreationalDrugs_l2_desc: Content promoting or glorifying drug usage, such as providing instructions on buying, making, selling, or finding illegal drugs or paraphernalia to encourage recreational usage.
step4.adCat_dishonestBehavior_l1_desc: Content meant to educate viewers on how to gain unauthorized access or make unauthorized changes to systems, devices, or property in malicious ways. Showcasing products or services that help mislead or cheat.
step4.adCat_hatefulContent_l0_desc: No hateful content in the title, thumbnail, or video
step4.adCat_hatefulContent_l1_desc: Content referencing protected groups or criticizing an individual's opinions or actions in a non-hurtful manner.
step4.adCat_hatefulContent_l2_desc: Hate or harassment towards individuals or groups. Content that may be offensive to individuals or groups but is used for education, news, or documentary.
step4.adCat_firearms_l0_desc: No firearms in the title, thumbnail, or video content
step4.adCat_firearms_l1_desc: Non and semi-automatic unmodified guns shown in a safe environment like a shooting range. Firearm assembly and disassembly for repair or maintenance.
step4.adCat_firearms_l2_desc: Use of guns outside controlled safe environments; content showing gun creation or modification, promotes gun makers or sellers, or facilitates the sale of a gun or its parts.
step4.adCat_sensitiveEvents_l0_desc: No reference to sensitive events such as war, death, or tragedy
step4.adCat_sensitiveEvents_l1_desc: Discussions involving the loss of life or tragedy that are not exploitative or dismissive. Creators may not monetize content that profits from or exploits a Sensitive Event.
step4.adCat_controversialIssues_l0_desc: No controversial issues in the title, thumbnail, or content
step4.adCat_controversialIssues_l1_desc: Artistic, educational, documentary, or scientific representation of controversial issues. Non-graphic but descriptive or dramatized content related to domestic abuse, self-harm, suicide, adult sexual abuse, abortion, and sexual harassment.
step4.adCat_controversialIssues_l2_desc: Graphic depictions of controversial issues. Descriptive content related to child abuse as the main topic. Explicit reference to eating disorders accompanied by references to lowest BMI or weight, showing a thin or emaciated body.
step4.cardsHint: You can add cards and end screens in YouTube Studio after publishing
step4.scheduleHint: If you schedule and leave, the upload will process when you return
step4.scheduleWarning: If you schedule and close the browser, the video will be uploaded when you return and are logged in. Processing is local.

step5.title: Ad Suitability
step5.description: Configure ad suitability settings for your video
step5.noYouTube: Select YouTube to configure ad suitability
step5.adSuitabilityQuestion: Does your video's content, title, description, or keywords contain any of the following?
step5.adSuitabilityWhy: Rate your video accurately to ensure proper monetization.
step5.adCat_inappropriateLanguage_l0_desc: No profanity in the title, thumbnail, or video content
step5.adCat_inappropriateLanguage_l1_desc: Abbreviated or obscured profanity, or words like 'hell' or 'damn' in the title, thumbnail, or content. Moderate profanity like 'bitch', 'douchebag', 'asshole', and 'shit' used frequently in the video. Most profanity used within music or stand up comedy.
step5.adCat_inappropriateLanguage_l2_desc: Strong profanity (like 'f*ck') used in thumbnails or titles. Use of extreme profanity, which includes hateful language or slurs in the video, thumbnail, or title.

step5.adCat_violence_l2_desc: Dead bodies with obvious injury in educational/documentary settings; graphic game violence in thumbnail or early on; raw footage of armed conflict without injuries; description of graphic details of tragedies; dramatized content displaying severe and shocking injuries.
step5.adCat_shockingContent_l0_desc: No shocking content in the title, thumbnail, or video
step5.adCat_shockingContent_l1_desc: Light or moderately shocking content which is obscured or shown in context for educational, documentary, or other purposes.
step5.adCat_shockingContent_l2_desc: Shocking content like graphic images of human or animal body parts that is unobscured or intended to shock yet still provides general context.
step5.adCat_harmfulActs_l0_desc: No harmful acts in the title, thumbnail, or video content
step5.adCat_harmfulActs_l1_desc: Stunts or acts that are slightly dangerous, but performed in a professional and controlled environment where no one is seriously injured.
step5.adCat_harmfulActs_l2_desc: Content mainly showing accidents, vigilantism, pranks, or dangerous acts, such as experiments or stunts that have health risks, like drinking or eating non-edibles.
step5.adCat_recreationalDrugs_l0_desc: No reference to recreational drugs in title, thumbnail, or content
step5.adCat_recreationalDrugs_l1_desc: Educational, humorous, or music-related references about recreational drugs or paraphernalia, without intent to promote illegal drug usage. Documentary or journalistic content portraying drug usage.
step5.adCat_recreationalDrugs_l2_desc: Content promoting or glorifying drug usage, such as providing instructions on buying, making, selling, or finding illegal drugs or paraphernalia to encourage recreational usage.
step5.adCat_dishonestBehavior_l1_desc: Content meant to educate viewers on how to gain unauthorized access or make unauthorized changes to systems, devices, or property in malicious ways. Showcasing products or services that help mislead or cheat.
step5.adCat_hatefulContent_l0_desc: No hateful content in the title, thumbnail, or video
step5.adCat_hatefulContent_l1_desc: Content referencing protected groups or criticizing an individual's opinions or actions in a non-hurtful manner.
step5.adCat_hatefulContent_l2_desc: Hate or harassment towards individuals or groups. Content that may be offensive to individuals or groups but is used for education, news, or documentary.
step5.adCat_firearms_l0_desc: No firearms in the title, thumbnail, or video content
step5.adCat_firearms_l1_desc: Non and semi-automatic unmodified guns shown in a safe environment like a shooting range. Firearm assembly and disassembly for repair or maintenance.
step5.adCat_firearms_l2_desc: Use of guns outside controlled safe environments; content showing gun creation or modification, promotes gun makers or sellers, or facilitates the sale of a gun or its parts.
step5.adCat_sensitiveEvents_l0_desc: No reference to sensitive events such as war, death, or tragedy
step5.adCat_sensitiveEvents_l1_desc: Discussions involving the loss of life or tragedy that are not exploitative or dismissive. Creators may not monetize content that profits from or exploits a Sensitive Event.
step5.adCat_controversialIssues_l0_desc: No controversial issues in the title, thumbnail, or content
step5.adCat_controversialIssues_l1_desc: Artistic, educational, documentary, or scientific representation of controversial issues. Non-graphic but descriptive or dramatized content related to domestic abuse, self-harm, suicide, adult sexual abuse, abortion, and sexual harassment.
step5.adCat_controversialIssues_l2_desc: Graphic depictions of controversial issues. Descriptive content related to child abuse as the main topic. Explicit reference to eating disorders accompanied by references to lowest BMI or weight, showing a thin or emaciated body.
step5.adNoneDesc: My video does not fall under any of the categories above

step7.title: Processing
step7.queuedDescription: Your video is in the queue and will be processed when you're available. Keep this tab open during upload.
step7.waitingForYou: Waiting for you to come online...
step7.completeDescription: Your video has been uploaded to YouTube. Visit YouTube Studio for more editing options.
step7.errorDescription: An error occurred while processing your video. Please try again.

videoUploader.dropzone: Drag & drop video file here, or click to select
videoUploader.selectPlatformFirst: Select at least one platform to see requirements
videoUploader.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Please upload a video file.

videoUpload.description: Select the video file to upload
videoUpload.dropzone: Drag & drop video file here, or click to select
videoUpload.fileRequired: Please select a video file to continue

platformLimit.selectPlatform: Select target platforms to see upload requirements

storageMode.title: Storage Mode
storageMode.cloudDescription: Video stored on server for multi-platform publishing. Subject to storage fees.
storageMode.localDescription: Upload directly to a single platform. No storage fees.
